---
title: ""
---

<div class="home-hero">

<div class="home-hero-photo">
![Bruno Barbosa](headshot.png){fig-alt="Portrait of Bruno Barbosa"}

<blockquote class="impact-quote">
I help organizations mitigate cyber risks and strengthen data protection through practical controls, clear documentation, and stakeholder alignment.

</blockquote>

</div>

<div class="home-hero-copy">

# Bruno Barbosa

## Cybersecurity, Governance, Risk & Data Privacy Professional

I'm a cybersecurity professional focused on governance, risk, and data privacy, with 4 years of experience across compliance, third-party risk management, and audit support. Based in Burnaby (Metro Vancouver), I'm completing an MBA at University Canada West (2026) to strengthen strategic and leadership capabilities.

<div class="button-row">
  <a class="custom-button" href="https://www.linkedin.com/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
  <a class="custom-button" href="mailto:your.email@email.com">Email</a>
  <a class="custom-button" href="Resume.html">Resume</a>
</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="home-about-split">

<div class="home-about-copy">

## About Me

I am building my career at the intersection of business and cybersecurity. My background includes work related to information security, third-party risk, privacy, and compliance, supported by hands-on experience with frameworks and practices such as ISO/IEC 27001, NIST, LGPD, GDPR, and TPRM. Through my MBA, I am expanding that technical foundation with stronger business analysis, strategy, and communication skills.

</div>

<div class="home-highlight-panel">

<h3>Highlights</h3>

<div class="highlights-grid">

<div class="highlight-card">
<h4>Strengths</h4>
<ul>
  <li>Structured thinking</li>
  <li>Reliability</li>
  <li>Teamwork</li>
  <li>Continuous improvement</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="highlight-card">
<h4>Focus Areas</h4>
<ul>
  <li>Cybersecurity governance</li>
  <li>Cybersecurity Auditing</li>
  <li>Risk & compliance</li>
  <li>Privacy & data protection</li>
  <li>Stakeholder communication</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="highlight-card">
<h4>Availability</h4>
<ul>
  <li>Open to internships</li>
  <li>Open to project-based work</li>
  <li>Interested in GRC, privacy, and governance roles</li>
</ul>
</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

## Explore My Portfolio

<div class="page-links-grid">

<div class="page-link-card">
<h3><a href="Resume.html">Resume</a></h3>
<p>Detailed overview of my professional experience, education, and certifications.</p>
</div>

<div class="page-link-card">
<h3><a href="projects.html">Projects</a></h3>
<p>Selected case studies and practical work related to cybersecurity, privacy, and business problem-solving.</p>
</div>

<div class="page-link-card">
<h3><a href="skills.html">Skills</a></h3>
<p>Core competencies, tools, and frameworks that support my professional profile.</p>
</div>

</div>
